aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by presence of tag key-value pairs in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by tag key-value pairs attached to the resource

mgn:CreateAction.description: Filters access by the name of a resource-creating API action
